source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

Basta solo cavâse da testa tutte ste idee fighette che fan vedde su pinterest ò dove capita. O punto l'é documentâ o processo invece de fâ quarcösa de bellinetto solo da védde. Addeuvralo comme un journal da devastâ, se te torna ben. Dipende tutto da chi o fa.

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook

source_doc:
Tinkering with my stereo system this week has got me thinking about an oddity that I've never been able to get to the bottom of...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
The amp is a Philips FA454 and the CD Player is a Philips CD150.
According to the amp manual I can connect the units with a "8-pole DIN to 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" cable."
I take this to mean an 8 pin din to a 5 pin + stereo RCA cable...which sounds cursed.
Never been able to find one. Can anyone make one?

The service manual for the amp is nice and clear (picture 2 in above toot), but I can't find anything as nice for the CD player. I've attached a picture (picture 4 in the above toot) from the service manual that I *think* is the relevant section.
Currently I have the CD player hooked up with just the RCA cables and it all works fine, but if I could find/make the correct Din to Din + RCA cable then I could use some additional functionality and free up the only RCA stereo inputs on my amp.

There's a repair café this weekend in the town where I live...if I'm still puzzling over it all by then I might take it all along there and see if they can help me hack together a cable.

L'amplificatô l'é un Philips FA454 e o letô CD l'é un Philips CD150.
Secondo o manuale de l'ampli posso colegâ e unitæ con un cavo "DIN a 8 poli a DIN a 5 poli + 2 x CINCH a singolo polo".
Mi o capiscio comme un cavo DIN a 8 pin a 5 pin + RCA stereo... che pâ proprio 'na roba maledetta.
No n'ò mâi trovæto un. Gh'é quarchedun che o peu fâne un?

O manuale de serviçio de l'ampli o l'é bello ciæo (figua 2 do toot de sciâ), ma pe-o letô CD no trovo ninte de cösi ciæo. Gh'ò alegòu 'na figua (figua 4 do toot de sciâ) do manuale de serviçio che *me pâ* a seçion giusta.
Òua o letô CD o l'è colegòu solo co-i cavi RCA e fonçionn-a tutto ben, ma se riescîsse a trovâ/fâ o cavo giusto DIN a DIN + RCA porriâ dovrâ quarchedonca fonçion in ciù e liberâ e sole entræ RCA stereo do mæ ampli.

Sto fin de setemànn-a gh'é un repair café into paese addò stò... se pe-a dòppo son ancora lì che me spacco a testa con 'sta faccenda, magari me pòrto tutto lì e veddo se me peuan agiutâ a mettî insemm-a un cavo.

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

Nevada, the Silver State.
Yay!
Hey, honey.
We'll be there in about an hour.
Try to have a good attitude, honey.
So what's the plan with grandma?
I don't know.
Selling the ranch?
I don't know, but I don't see any other options.
I think she'll move and come live with us in LA.
I doubt it.
She likes the country.

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise

Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. hypo_0:
Sto lezeindo o report undercover de Gloria Steinem in sce cöse l'ése 'na Playboy Bunny... ò finîo a Parte I e cazzo🤔
Ben che sapesse beniscimo che Playboy a l'é ehm... 'na CORPORAZION lol... no gh'aveivo idea de quanto tutta a so infrastrutûa a servisse davvero a perpetuâ o classismo in 'na maniera stracreepy, mentre de fòua se presentavan comme l'opçion "de classe" e quindì "ciù etica" rispeto, pe dî, a Hustler

Più tardi posterò quarchedunn-a screenshot, ma pe fasse capî o senso, e Bunnies (che l'ëan cameriere de cocktail), doveivan:
- acetâ paghe ciù basse (de $200-150, equivalenti a i $2.5K de ancheu) de quelle publicizzæ
- consegnâ o 50% de tutte e mance
- dæ o cögnome ai "Number 1 key holders" (cioè, celebritæ/elite) se ghe vegneiva domandou
- esse sottoposte a 'n esame pelvico e a 'n test do sangue, ma no ghe l'ëa consentîo sceglie o medico
- esse spiæ da 'n detective privou
- fâ de tutto pe ascónde i marîi/fiansæ

O ponto centrae che unisce tutto questo:
e Bunnies NO POEIVAN ASSOLUTAMENTE (punîe co-o licenziamento) frequentâ nisciun atro impiegou ò cliente... MA accompagnâ e uscî co-i "Number 1 key holders" l'ëa permesso, se no addiritûa incoraggiou. O vëi dove sto a andâ a parâ?

Æ neuve reclute ghe vegniva dæta 'na "Bunny Bible" da studiâ pe imparâ tutte quelle regole e instruçioin strambe.
Pe mencionâne quarchedunn-a in ciù:
- a prestaçion de travaggio de e Bunnies a vegneiva valutâ con 'n "merit system" (SCÌ, pròpio cösci!) inveçe de riceive 'na contestazion scritta. Cöse no sorprendente, o merito no l'ëa giudicou solo da 'na bon-a etica do travaggio, ma anche da requisiti motò precixi in sce l'aspetto e l'atteggiamento.
- gh'ëa 'n sistema de incentivi che premiava e Bunnies che vendeivan ciù liquore e mercansia

@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

Gh'è quarchedün segno ò gonfiô? Se l'è gonfiô aloa faelo savéi a-o studio e tegnighe d'êuggio.
Supponendo che a l'abbia piggiou da-e venne in sce o gômio, gh'è a possibilità che a sia andâ troppu a fondo e a l'abbia tucou a parete de drîo da venna, e che un tendin de sotta o t'abbia lasciou o segno quande a l'è vegnua fœa. Spero che òua o sia passou.

Sciò, da-o gômio. O me fa ancon mâ, ma o va megio. Nisciun segno né sangramento però.

source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

hypo_0:
Campanî
A #poexia thread
i.
Un campanî de cesa roman-a,
croxe d'öua a cöregge e nêuve:
a campann-a a sònn-a, a lassa andâ o ton de ottón,
a canta fòua inte a cappa de nebbia,
o sò trillo erto l'é un richiamo
pe-i fedeli de longo anâti.
No gh'é ciù o zelo da pietæ:
tanti aube tramontæ.
A torre de preja a sta de guardia
sotta a masca de scûoia e piöva,
co-i cê a sguerscian o so bombardamento
ancón in sciô tegge do tæto.
🧵👇🏼
#poexia #unapoexiaalgiorno #tenebroso #neoclassico #cesa #neutte #fotografia

ii.
Chi o l'ha tirou a còrda da campann-a?
Un monaco solo into sò ciòstro
sens'atro ciù d'acòrdio con lü.
Lü, granello inta òstrega da cesa —
ma nisciunna cella a tegniva o sò letto,
nisciunna polveia mossa da-e sò scarpe,
o sò nome mai o l'é stæto dîto,
nisciùn libri vêgio ch'o l'avesse addeuviou.
A còrda da campann-a a pende, consumâ, sfilacciâ,
roseggiâ da-i denti di rattin da cesa.
L'é tanto che no dondéggia ciù,
tirâ da man sotta.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
O vento da neutte o sussurra salmi
e o spia cantici in canto
pe fa dondolâ o battaglio de bronzo,
e mi respóndo in descanto —
ma no coa mæ voxe.
O vento o inghiotte o mæ ciammo,
o fa sonâ o sò strepito sacro
co-e man da sò burrasca.
✋🏼🧵

Campanîle
Un thread de #poexia
i.
Un campanîle de cesa roman-a,
croxe d’öu ch’a se slongia verso e nêuve:
a campann-a a tòcca, a libera o sònn do metallo,
a canta fòua traverso a velâ de brömmia,
o sò rintocco alto l’é un richiammo
pe-i fedeli da tanto tempo sparîi.
No gh’é ciù o zelo da pietæ:
tante aube tramontæ.
A seua torre de preja a monta guardia
drento a masca da piöva do crepöscio,
mentre i cê a sciorran a seua sbarassâ
ancón in sce e tegge do tæto.
🧵👇🏼
#poexia #poexiadelgiorno #malinconico #neoclassico #cesa #neutte #fotografia

ii.
Chi l’ha tirou a còrda da campann-a?
Un monaco solo into sò ciostro
senza nisciùn ciù in armonia con lü.

eppûe nisciunna cella a teneiva o sò letto,

ma no coa mæ voxe.

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR

giorno 1:
svouòu o armadio da camera prinçipâ
& o contenûo di scatole in sce 'na parei.

She talked about how impossible it is to be a woman in today's society.
She spoke for over two minutes without being interrupted by a single man, saying things like, you have to be a boss, but you can't be mean.
You have to be thin but not too thin.
You have to never get old, never be rude, never show up.
Oh, sorry.
Our male director is telling me I need to wrap it up here to present America with her.
To see her award.
Is the woman that she delivered that speech to.
Please welcome Margot Robbie.

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅

the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

Can you tell us any more?
No, Lady Clementine.
That's all I can say.

hypo_0:
Alloa, ste trombe chi son comme un monumento famoso de chi.
E in pràtica, se t'entri drento e trombe ò sotta de lô, ti peu sentiâ de musica.
Oua semmo arivæ inte un parco pien de statue de gatti.
O sonava cöscì unico e mi amio i gatti, aloa òvio che gh'emmo dovuo vegnî a dâghe un'occiâ.

hypo_2: Alloa, ste trombe chi son comme un monumento famoso de sto pòsto. E in pràtica, se ti intri dento e trombe ò anche sotta de lô, ti peu sentî a musica. Oua semmo arivæ inte un parco pien de statue de gatti. A pareiva cöscì particolare e mi amio i gatti, aloa l'é ovvio che semmo vegnui a dâghe un'ociâ.
hypo_3: Alloa, ste trombe chi son comme un monumento famoso de chi. E in pratica, se ti vai dento e trombe ò sotta de lô, ti peu sentî a muxica. Oua semmo rivæ inte un parco pien de statue de gatti. A me pareiva cöscì unico e mi amio i gatti, aloa pe forza doveivimo vegnî a vedde.
hypo_4: Alloa, ste trombe chi son comme un monumento famoso de chi. E in pratica, se ti intri dento e trombe ò ti passi sotta, ti peu sentî a musica. hypo_5: Alloa, ste trombe chi son comme un monumento famoso da ste parte. E in pratica, se ti intri dento e trombe ò ti passi sotta, ti peu sentî da musica. Oua semmo rivæ inte un parco pien de statue de gatti. A sembrava cösa tanto unica e mi amio i gatti, aloa l'é ovvio che doveivimo vegnî a vedde cöse l'ea.
hypo_6: Alloa, ste trombe chì son comme un monumento famoso de chi parte. E in pratica, se ti vanni dento e trombe ò sotta de lô, ti peu sentî da musica. Oua semmo arivæ inte un parco pien de statue de gatti. A me pareiva cösa cöscì unica e mi amio i gatti, alloa l'é ovvio che semmo vegnui a dâghe un'ociâ.
hypo_7: Alloa, ste trombe chi son comme un monumento famoso de sto pòsto. E in pratica, se ti intri dento e trombe ò sotta de lô, ti peu sentî a musica. Oua semmo arivæ inte un parco pien de statue de gatti. A l'éua cösa propia unica e mi amio i gatti, alloa l'é ovvio che semmo vegnui a veddilo.

[
  "Lookin’ Good",
  "Boost Your Business !",
  "Shoppable Instagram Posts are just a few clicks away",
  "Let customers order directly from your Instagram posts when you’re powered by Mambalo.",
  "Tap to tag products",
  "Home decor for lovely places like yours",
  "Unleash the power of email with Mailchimp",
  "Use your Mambalo purchase data to segment your email list and create targeted campaigns for current and potential customers.",
  "Share discount coupons",
  "Collect emails with a sign-up form",
  "Short on time? Make ‘em automated",
  "Unleash the power of email with MailChimp",
  "Facebook & Google Retargeting: How to Turn Your Visitors Into Customers",
  "Every visitor on your site is an opportunity to make a sale.",
  "You can sit and wait when your visitors remember your brand, or… You can bring customers back to your online store with remarketing. And that’s no rocket science — read this article to learn how to get started.",
  "Facebook retargeting ads will appear on Facebook sites, and they get about two billion visits every month.",
  "The word “dynamic” in the term means that something in the ads changes – in this case, the items displayed in the ad. To give you a proper understanding of how it works, let’s go through some examples.",
  "We also have a visitor named Janet. Janet also finds the Awesome Super Shoes store on Google. She likes our Red Shoes, but it is four days to her payday and she is short on cash, so she leaves the store website without making a purchase.",
  "Five days later, she is on Facebook, browsing her friends’ posts. Between the posts, she can see an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Red Shoes she already liked. Since she got her paycheck yesterday, she decides to spoil herself and buy the shoes.",
  "In the evening, he goes through several review sites about running shoes. Since most of the sites are on the Google Display Network, one of them runs an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Running Shoes Jared has already looked at. He hasn’t found better shoes yet and he’s quite tired, so he decides to buy the Running Shoes.",
  "And that is what dynamic retargeting is about. No matter how visitors get to your webpage, if they don’t purchase anything, they’ll see your ads with the product they were interested in.",
  "Hit launch campaign and that’s it. No coding, no messing with CSV files, no stress. The process is the same for Google remarketing ads.",
  "We can’t wait to learn how you’re doing retargeting in your Mambalo store. Tell us in the comments below!"
]

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Bongiorno mondi!
Sto matin anémmo a-a discarica. O servîa a levâ un pö de roba che gh'emmo cernûo ieri da-o vialetto. No penso che poémo sgomberâ tutto a meno che no piggéssemo o rimorchio, ma o rimorchio o l'é pin de açaio da portâ a pesâ.
Ciù tardi forse continuo a impachettâ e casse tote.
#BongiornoMondi

Giro a-a discarica fæto, e n'atra machinn-a carrega l'é stæta sgomberâ.
Ò cavòu o neuvo asse do rimorchio, e o sistema do motô de traino do rimorchio, da-o carrego de ferrivecchio. Quello o veu dì che poémo mettaghe ciù ferrivecchio lì drento e ascì no finîmo pe pesâ pe sbaglio i peççi che voggio tegnî.
Penso che adesso comincio a spostâ l'açaio da ferrivecchio da-o giardin de dadrê into rimorchio accoscì o l'é pronto pe partî.
I prexi de l'açaio da ferrivecchio no son tanto alti in sto momento ma megio de ninte, se ne porto assæ tutto in ta 'na botta sola.
Gh'é ancon da cernî o ferrivecchio no ferroso.

Quella roba che quande ti t'ê a levâ i pneumatici marcî da-e ruedde piccin-e e larghe do trattorin da prato....
Na fadiga enorme pe smontâ un lato do pneumatico, ma da l'atro canto o l'ea proprio rugginò stretto forte a-o bordo do cerchio.
Intanto che ghe metteivo pe staccâ o tallon, m'ea scordòu che l'atro lato l'aveivo za fæto, e son finîo co-o cerchio libero ma tutto drento o pneumatico!
Ò dovûo rimontâ o pneumatico da quel lato, e pö lavorâghe intorno pe tirâ fò o cerchio.
Ò dovûo tagliâ a camera d'aria ascì pe cavâ quella fò!
Me domando quante atre gomme gh'ò ancon da smontâ? Fin chiòu ne ò fæte quattro.

[
  "Powerful and easy to use. No set-up or transaction fees. And no credit card required. Set up your free account once, and keep it as long as you like. Exactly what “free” is supposed to be.",
  "Join the 1.6 million small businesses that have trusted the Mambalo E‑commerce platform to sell online.",
  "Set up your Mambalo store once to easily sync and sell across a website, social media, marketplaces like Amazon, and live in-person. Get started with one, or try them all.",
  "№1 Fastest implementation e-commerce platform in 2019.",
  "Get expert technical support whenever you need it.",
  "Mambalo App Store",
  "Grow your online store with new tools and apps from our Mambalo partners.",
  "№1 Fastest implementation e-commerce platform in 2019.",
  "Turn social sharing into social selling. Easily add and sell products on your Facebook and Instagram feeds to let shoppers browse and make purchases from inside their favorite social media channels.",
  "Sell on marketplaces",
  "Get a piece of the $200B pie with marketplace integrations for eBay and Amazon. Sell seamlessly across the most popular marketplaces right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Sell online, in-store, and on-the-go",
  "Accept payments in-store and on the go with Square and 52 other point-of-sale systems. And best of all, inventory levels are automatically updated in your Mambalo account so all your stores stay perfectly in sync.",
  "Take your small business global with built-in international payment tools and translation support for 50 languages — and counting.",
  "No credit card required.",
  "Manage anywhere from the Mambalo mobile app",
  "Shipping that works for you",
  "Security you can trust",
  "Create, manage, and track advertisements, all from your Mambalo dashboard. Create low-cost advertisements that drive the right shoppers to your store in minutes. No experience required. You provide the dream, we’ll handle the techy stuff.",
  "* That’s it! Track results in your Mambalo dashboard",
  "Shop designer sunglasses for women, men and kids. Wearel online store. Choose among the most stylish sunglasses at an affordable price."
]
```

source_doc:
Melbourne Renegades host Glenn Maxwell and the Melbourne Stars at Marvel Stadium in BBL15 after Usman Khawaja and Brisbane Heat host Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominated with 82 not out off 51 balls and Glenn Maxwell recalled the feeling of ball on bat in a subdued innings of 20 not out off 17 balls, which included one massive six. He has not lost his ability and would have enjoyed the chance to spend time in the middle.

The crowd of 42,846 was not given the contest they hoped for as the Stars won the match by eight wickets with 25 balls remaining.

It keeps Melbourne Stars in contention as they break a three-match losing sequence and makes life hard for Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis bowled well to take 3-33 and was on a hat-trick at one stage while Harper is in great form having hit 356 runs at a strike rate of 159 for the tournament. He was man-of-the-match.

Tom Rogers bounced back with a fast 50 against Melbourne Renegades

But it was all over once Tom Rogers helped himself to 50 off 19 balls to start the innings with an opening partnership of 84 with Harper.

"They outplayed us at the "G so it was nice to get our fifth win," Harper told Fox Cricket.

Most interesting were the comments from the Fox Cricket commentary box where former England captain Michael Vaughan made it clear how disappointed he was with the way the English hierarchy handled a nightclub incident involving Harry Brook in New Zealand before they arrived in Australia for The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars veteran Peter Siddle said "it was a good turnaround" with the win pushing the team back into second spot on the BBL table.

It's starting to heat up with three games remaining for Melbourne Renegades and two matches for Melbourne Stars.

There is still plenty of cricket left this summer so keep tuning in. Thanks for following. Can the Stars finally win the title?

Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
I Melbourne Renegades ospitan Glenn Maxwell e i Melbourne Stars a-o Marvel Stadium inta BBL15 dòppo che Usman Khawaja e i Brisbane Heat ospitan i Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper o l'à dominou con 82 no out in 51 balle e Glenn Maxwell o s'è tornou a sentî a sensaçion da balla in sce-o bat inte 'na prestasion sottotono da 20 no out in 17 balle, che a inclueiva un sei gigantesco. No l'ha perso a seu abilità e l'avieiva godûo l'ocasion de passâ do tempo in mezo a-o campo.

A folla de 42.846 spettatoî no l'ha avuo a sfida che a sperava, visto che i Stars an vinto a partita de otto wicket con 25 balle ancora da zugâ.

Sto successo o mantegn i Melbourne Stars in corsa, interrompendo 'na striscia de tre sconfitte consecutive e complicando a vita ai Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis o l'ha lanciou ben, cö 3-33, ed è stæto vicino a 'n hat-trick in un momento, mente Harper o l'è in grandissima forma dòppo avê segnòu 356 corse con 'na strike rate de 159 into torneo. O l'è stæto nominoou ommo da partita.

Tom Rogers o s'è riscattou con 'n rapido 50 contro i Melbourne Renegades

Ma a partita a l'ea de fènnia quande Tom Rogers o l'ha firmou 50 in 19 balle, avviando l'innings con 'na partnership d'avertura da 84 insieme a Harper.

"A-o 'G ne an surclassou, pe questo l'è stæto bello ottignî a nòstra quinta vittoria", o l'ha dito Harper a Fox Cricket.

E cöse ciù interessanti son stæte i commenti da cabina de telecronaca de Fox Cricket, indove l'ex capitanno de l'Inghilterra Michael Vaughan o l'ha fæto capî ciæo quanto o fusse deluso da comme i vertici inglesi an gestio un incidente in 'na discoteca che coinvolgeiva Harry Brook in Neuva Zelanda primma che arrivassen in Australia pe The Ashes.

O veteranno di Melbourne Stars Peter Siddle o l'ha dito che "l'è stæto un bel ribaltamento", con sta vittoria che a riporta a squaddra in segondo pòsto inta classifica BBL.

A tension a sta cresscendo, con tre partite ancora da zugâ pe i Melbourne Renegades e doî incontri pe i Melbourne Stars.

Gh'è ancón tanto cricket in sto istæ, quindi stæ collegæ. Graçie pe avei seguio. I Stars porràn finalmentte vincî o titolo?

E cöse ciù interessanti son stæte i commenti da postassion de telecronaca de Fox Cricket, indove l'ex capitanno de l'Inghilterra Michael Vaughan o l'ha fæto capî chiaramente quanto o fusse deluso da comme i vertici inglesi an gestio un incidente in discoteca che coinvolgeiva Harry Brook in Neuva Zelanda, primma de rivâ in Australia pe The Ashes.

O veteranno di Melbourne Stars Peter Siddle o l'ha dito che "l'è stæto un bel cambiamento de rotta", con sta vittoria che a riporta a squaddra in segondo pòsto inta classifica da BBL.

A tenscion a monta, con tre partite ancora da zugâ pe i Melbourne Renegades e doî incontri pe i Melbourne Stars.

Gh'è ancora tanto cricket da vedde in sto istæ, dunque continuæ a seguî. Graçie pe avei seguio. I Stars porràn finalmentte vincî o titolo?
hypo_7:
I Melbourne Renegades ospitan Glenn Maxwell e i Melbourne Stars a-o Marvel Stadium inta BBL15, dòppo che Usman Khawaja e i Brisbane Heat an ospitou i Sydney Thunder

A seu classe no l'ha mia persa e de segûo o l'avieiva apprezzou a poscibilità de passâ un pö de tempo in mezzo.

O publico de 42.846 spettatoî no l'ha visto a sfida che o sperava, visto che i Stars an vinto a partita pe otto wicket con 25 balle ancora da zugâ.

source_doc:
A couple of weeks ago, my boyfriend and I did pottery.
I mean, actual pottery.
And it's now time to collect our masterpieces.
So I'm in the office today, and it is literally just a 20 minute walk away from the office.
But the one time I went, I obviously used my phone map because I'd never been in that area before.
So let's hope I can remember some orientation skills and use this thing.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0: Quarche settemann-a fa, mi e o mæ fidansou emmo fæto de çimmaia, dæto proprio vera, e adesso l'é o momento de andâ a pigiâ e nòstre òpere maesce; oue son in ufficcio ancheu, e o l'é letteralmente solo a vinte minuti a pé da l'ufficcio, ma l'unnica vòtta che ghe son andâ ò ovviamente dovou addeuviâ a mappa do telefono perché no son mai stæta in quella çòna primma, pe-a quale speremmo che me ne arrembi de comme orientâme un pö e d'adeuviâ sto coso.

Un pæio de settemann-e fa, mi e o mæ fidansou emmo fæto ceramica.
Voeuo dì, ceramica da bon.
E adesso l'é rivou o momento de andâ a piggiâ e nòstre capolæuvri.
Alôa ancheu son in uffiçio, e o l'é proprio solo a vinte minuti a pé da l'uffiçio.

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
$partner o l'ha 'na videoconsulta con Ikea pe fâ un preventivo pe 'na cöxinn-a su misura. L'è 'na sbirciâ fascinante into l'ecosistema di servizi online pe i boomer.
1. Ti mandan o link pe a videoconsulta, trei settemann-e fa. O l'usa a sò solussion proprietaia de videoconferensa de Ikea
2. Te domandan i disegni & i render 3D pe a cöxinn-a neuva
3. ti mandan 'na mail che a dixe "graçie pe avei mandou o progetto
4. Nêuatri se coleghemmo ancheu, an començan a ciamâ con "o nòstro sistema o l'ha blocou i tò file, disegnémmo a toa cöxinn-a inscemme"
1/x

5. $partner o domanda se gh'è quarchedun mòddo de condividde i progetti (stra-detaigiæ, che n'han ciapou tipo 'na settemanna òmmaña intera pe mette insieme), ma o venditô de Ikea o l'è attaccou a-o sò copion, e no ghe n'importa pròpio niente.
6. O passo dòppo into copion o l'è "rifâ pian pian o progetto da zero a-o telefono co-o cliente, pichetando a tastêa e no andando veloce drento l'interfaccia do sò software de progettassion"
2/x

7. No peuan condividde o schermmo, aloa a l'è 'na pagliacciâ de malintesi ripetui in sciô quæ parte de quæ imagine se staggian riferindo

8. O reloggio o l'è appena passou oltre o tempo che o doveiva êse a consulta intera, e son solo a-o 35% do percorso pe piggiâ e misûe necessaie.

9. Fin chi gh'è stæti letteralmente 8 minuti de venditô de Ikea che inseriva pian pian e misûe fornie

3. Mandan 'na mail che a dixe "graçie pe avei mandou o progetto"
4. Ancheu ne collighemmo, e comensan a ciamâ con "o nòstro sistema o l'ha blocou i tò file, disegnémmo a toa cöxinn-a insemm-a"
1/x

5. $partner o domanda se gh'è quarche mòddo de condividde i progetti (stra-detaigiæ, n'han ciapou tipo 'na settemanna intera de lavoro pe mette insieme), ma quello de Ikea o l'è inchiodou a-o sò copion, e no ne veu sentî raxon.
6. O passo dòppo into copion o l'è "rifâ pian pian o progetto da zero a-o telefono co-o cliente, becchettando in sciâ tastêa e andando minga svelto con l'interfaccia do software de progettassion"
2/x

7. No peuan condividde o schermo, aloa a l'è 'na pagliacciâ de malintesi continui in sce quæ parte de quæ immagine se staggian riferindo

8. O reloggio o l'è appena passou oltre o tempo che o doveiva ese quello de tutta a consulta, e son solo a-o 35% de tutte e misûe che ghe servan.

9. Fin chi gh'è stæti letteralmente 8 minuti de quello de Ikea che inseriva pian pian e misûe che ghe semmo dæto

#PWHL #hizzackySeason

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

hypo_0:
@la A regola #1 de la machinazion no l'è forse che se no t'æ ancon afrontou, no l'è né in squadro né pian?

@azonenberg scì, de seguo, ma *voxeivo* afrontalo. A-o sòllo ò solo misso mâ o zero do strumento.
Peché davo pe scontou ch'o fusse più o meno pian.
Ancheu fasso un pêzzo in ciù. O materiale gh'é. E se no o fasso me resterà in testa sensa fin. In ciù, quande provavo o cuscinetto, ò roto a colla che tegniva o pêzzo in sce a mæ piastra, pe çò avieiva da tornâ a indicâlo de neuvo, e no ghe n'ho voggiaaaaa, pe cui.....

@la Te capiscio ben.
M'è capitao un problema simile quande travaggiavo in casa mæ, dove pròpio tutti i riferimenti che t'avissci pensou de addeuviâ i êan sbaliæ.
Ò fæto mette da un artigian un telaio de porta a piombo e in squadro. Ò dovuo strappâ via un pê de montanti dòppo ch'o l'é anæto via, peché a porta a doveiva ëse tipo un grado fòa livello pe ëse a filo co-o pavimento e no restâ sospéiza in æa da unn-a parte.
Un'atra parte de muro (mêza ãtezza) a l'à ògni montante taggiou co-a massima atension a misura, peché nisciun duî son de-a mæxima dimension... O pavimento no l'è pian, pe cui pe avê o banco a livello t'æ bisogna che o muro segge un parallelogramma e no un rettangolo

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

hypo_0:
Progressi dòppo un pö de pausa. Ò tirou föa a machina de cûxe pe fa a visiera e 'na cucidûa da corona. Mêza corona cûxia pi a visiera, posâ in sciô modello de carta fæto da-o cartamodello. Ò dovuo desfâ e recûxe a cucidûa a machina perché ò messo i spilli longho a cucidûa inveçe che de traverso e son andâa fòua tracciou. Pòsso rifâ a visiera se vòggio un pö ciù de profonditæ.
#modisteria

Votto panelli da corona e doî panelli da visiera montæ in trè peççi e fermæ co-i spilli pe dâ a forma generâle. Cartamodello Newsboy Cap de Sachi's Studio in velûo verde. Quæxi tutto cûxio a machina.
O cartamodello domanda 'na cucidûa de finitura longho e cucidûe di panelli da corona, cöse che peu fà pensâ òu a fîo abbinou òu a fîo a contrasto.
#modisteria

Vista da çimma primma de cûxe insemme e doî metà da corona. Stò riguardando o video co-e istruçioin. Vêggio che Sachi a l'adêuva quànti piccin clip a molla pendant a cucidûa inveçe de mette i spilli pe tutta a cucidûa.

Un giunto un pö pasticciou inti votto panelli che s'arriûniscian in sciô picco da coppola, contâto che stò pensando che forse ghe vêuve un bottòn ciù gròsso pe mascâ e cucidûe.

Corona del tutto montâ, co-o bottòn rivestîo de stoffa in sciô picco. Bordi vivi infilæ sottosotta a-a bonn-a. Cucidûe nê pressæ nê rifinie co-a cucidûa de finitura.
#modisteria

Un pö pasticciâ o ponto dove i votto spicchi s'arriûniscian in sciô picco da coppola, ascì che stò pensando che forse ghe voeiva un bottòn ciù gròsso pe mascâ e cucidûe.

Corona montâ del tutto, co-o bottòn rivestîo de stoffa in sciô picco. Bordi vivi infilæ sottosotta sensa strenze tròppo. Cucidûe né stiræ né rifinie co-a cucidûa de finitura.
#modisteria
hypo_6:
Un pö de progressi dòppo un tòcco de pausa. Ò tiròu fêua a màchina da cûxe pe fa a visiera e 'na cucidûa da corona. Mêza corona l'é za cûxia insémme a-a visiera, posâ in sciâ forma de carta fæta co-o cartamodello. Ò dovûo descûxe e cûxe torna a cucidûa a màchina perché ò missou i spilli longho a cucidûa inveçe che de traverso e son andâa fòua strada. Fòscia rifòu a visiera se vêuggio un pö ciù de profonditæ.
#modisteria

Votto spicchi da corona e doî tòcchi da visiera montæ in trè pezzi e fermæ co-i spilli pe dâghe a forma generâle. O cartamodello Newsboy Cap de Sachi's Studio in velûo verde. Quæxi tutto cûxio a màchina.
O cartamodello o domanda 'na cucidûa de finitura longho e cucidûe di spicchi da corona, cösa che peu fà pensâ òu a fîo abbinòu òu a fîo a contrasto.

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?

hypo_0:
M'aspetavo d'amâ Project Hail Mary, o l'HO AMOU Project Hail Mary, e m'ha anche distrutto in 'na manera proprio unica comme moegê d'ûn insegnante de sciénsa, dòppo un anno a vardâ tutta l'insegnamento scientifico vegne attaccou senza tregua e privou di fondi. A gente ama sto film, che son segûa che o l'andrà beniscimo, e odia o travaggio de mæ moegê, ghe demolisce i programmi e a veu che perdemmo e nòstre carriere. Com'è possibile che tutto questo segge vero tutto insémme.

L'é andâ via a-e 7 de mattin pe andâ a insegnâ i laboratöi pratici che a fa, indove maneggian e cellule, indove an aumentou e dimensioni de classe e ridotto i assistenti, a passa ciù ore de contatto co-i studenti inti sotterranei di lab che qualonque atro còrso do campus. A l'ha creou un programma pe-i studenti che rivan da-o community college pe fâghe avei travaggi finanziæ inti lab, arvendo e stradde STEM pe chi no l'avieiva mai avuo a possibilità. Pe tutto o travaggio che a fa ben oltre o dovuo, a vegne demonizzata comme "fâ DEI inta sciénsa", che loro ciamman illegale

Ma, sai comme l'é, penso che se a fusse stæta un ingegnere software maschio e bianco che scrive fanfic susce l'insegnamento scientifico.... a sarieiva stæta a-o seguo.

@grimalkina e mæxime ræixe gh'êan za in Hail Mary tbh. Mì me piaxe tanto Andy Weir e no penso che o l'abbia fatto apposta, ma tutta quella cösa do tipo "a burocrazia e a cooperazion son proprio a barriera pe fâ succede e cöse, e quande a merda arriva a-o ventilatô ghe veu un potente anti-burocrate che lascia perde a diplomazia e costringe tutti a fâ o progetto, a l'etica o quello che von i partecipanti no importa" m'ha dà l'impression d'ûna fantasy de potere d'individualismo molto americana, e penserei che l'abbia scritta un american se no o sapessci za

@jcachada @grimalkina
Pe quello che o vale, o libro o contien sto passo che no l'é finio into film.
---
“Son curioso,” ghe digo a Stratt. “Un-a votta che lanciemo Hail Mary. Ti cös'é che ti fæi dòppo?”
“Mi?” a dixeiva. “No importa. Un-a votta che Hail Mary a parte, a mæ autoritæ a finisce. Probabilmente me mettiàn sotto processo un mucchio de governi inferocîi pe abuso de potere. Magari passo o resto da mæ vita in prigione.”
“Mi sarò inta çella accanto a-a tua,” o dise Leclerc.
“Ti t'ê proprio per ninte preoccupâ de quello?”
A l'ha aossou e spalle. “Tutti noiatri dovemmo fâ di sacrifici. Se mi devo esse o bersaglio do mondo pe assicûâ a nòstra salvezza, aloa quello l'é o mæ sacrificio da fâ.”
---
L'é megio o pèzo se a pensa che a se stagghe sacrificando?

A gente a ama sto film, che son segûa che o l’avià successo, e intanto odian o travaggio de mæ moæ, ghe destrùggian i programmi e veuan che perdémmo e nòstre carriere. Com’è possibile che tutto questo segge vero tutto inscemme.

L’è uscîa a-e 7 de matin pe andâ a insegnâ i laboratöi pratici che a fa, indove a maneggian e cellule, indove an aumentou e classi e taggiou i assistenti didattici. A passa ciù ore a contatto co-i studenti inti seminterrati di laboratöi che qualonque atro còrso do campus. A l’ha creou un programma pe-i studenti che vegnan da-o community college pe daghe a possibilità de avéi travaggi finanziæ inti laboratöi, arvendo e stradde de STEM a chi no l’avieiva mai avuo l’ocasion. Pe tutto quello che a fa ben oltre o dovuo, a vegne demonizzata comme “quella che fa DEI inta sciensa”, che loro ciamman illegale

Ma, sai, immagino che se a fusse un ingegnere software bianco e òmo che scrive fanfic susce l’insegnamento scientifico.... a sarieiva a-o seguo.

@grimalkina e mæxime ræixe gh’ên za in Hail Mary, tbh. Andy Weir a mì me piaxe tanto e no penso che o l’abbia fæto apposta, ma tutta quella cösa do tipo “a burocrazia e a cooperazion son proprio a barriera che impede de fâ e cöse, e quande va tutto in merda ne serve un potente anti-burocrate che lascia perde a diplomazia e costringe tutti a portâ avanti o progetto, e l’etica ò quello che veu chi partecipa poco importa” m’ha dæto proprio l’idea d’ûna fantasia de potere individualista molto americana, e se no o sapéscia za chi l’ha scritta penserei che o l’è stæto un american

@jcachada @grimalkina
Pe quello che o vale, o libro o gh’à sto passo che no l’è finîo into film.
---
“Son curioso,” ghe digo a Stratt. “Unn-a votta che lanciémmo Hail Mary, ti cös’é che ti fæi dòppo?”
“Mi?” a l’ha dito. “No importa. Unn-a votta che Hail Mary a parte, a mæ autoritæ a finisce. Probabilmente me mettiàn sotto processo da 'n mucchio de governi inferocîi pe abuso de potere. Magari passo o resto da mæ vita in prigione.”
“Mi sarò inta çella accanto a-a tua,” o l’ha dito Leclerc.
“Ti t’ê proprio pe ninte preoccupâ de quello?”
A l’ha aossou e spalle. “Tutti noiatri dovémmo fâ di sacrifici. Se mi devo esse o capro espiatô do mondo pe assicûâ a nòstra salveça, aloa quello l’è o mæ sacrificio da fâ.”
---
L’è megio ò pèzo se a pensa de stâ sacrificandose?

source_doc:
The hosts took the lead in the 26th minute via the prolific Diaz as the Real Madrid player showed his scoring instinct.

Achraf Hakimi's corner was headed goalwards by Ayoub El Kaabi and Diaz deflected the ball in from close range.

He has now scored in each of Morocco's five games and extends his own record for most goals by a Moroccan at a single Cup of Nations finals, but left the field late on with a heavily strapped thigh that will be a concern for coach Walid Regragui.

Chances were hard to come by for both sides, but Abde Ezzalzouli headed narrowly over the crossbar from another Hakimi corner, while the latter laid on a headed chance for Saibari that was spurned.

Cameroon were unfortunate not to get a penalty kick when Mbeumo was caught in the box as Mauritanian referee Dahane Beida waved play on, while Georges-Kevin Nkoudou headed wide at the back post with the Indomitable Lions' best chance of the game.

Morocco made it 2-0 minutes later to kill off the contest when Saibari was left unmarked at the back post and had time to control the ball and fire low into the far corner of the net.

Ismael Saibari gave Morocco breathing space against Cameroon (REUTERS)

In Friday's other quarter-final, Iliman Ndiaye scored the only goal as Senegal booked an Afcon semi-final berth for the third time in the last four tournaments, beating 10-man Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye netted after 27 minutes, taking advantage of a goalkeeping howler to put Senegal ahead in a tense derby against their west African neighbours.

Mali were reduced to 10 men for the second half after captain Yves Bissouma was sent off for a second caution on the stroke of halftime.

He was booked first for a clumsy challenge in the 25th minute and was dismissed after a needless foul on Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali were down to 10 men from the 26th minute of their previous clash against Tunisia and still managed to squeeze through on penalties but there was no recovery this time around against a polished Senegalese outfit.

I padroni de caza gh’an pigiou o vantaggio a-o 26mo menutto gràçie a-o prolifico Diaz, co-o zogadô do Real Madrid ch’o l’à mostròu o sò istinto da go.

Un corner de Achraf Hakimi o l’é stæto incornouo verso a porta da Ayoub El Kaabi e Diaz o l’à deviòu a bala in ræzo da presso.

Òua o l’à segnòu in tutte e çinque partìe do Marocco e o stende o sò record personâ pe ciù go fæti da un marocchin inte fìnali de unna sola Coppa d’e Naçioin, ma o l’à lasciòu o campo inte fìn do match con unna cöscia fortemente fasciâ, cösa che porriæ preoccupâ o tecnico Walid Regragui.

E ocasiioin gh’éan ræe pe tutte e doie e squaddre, ma Abde Ezzalzouli o l’à incornouo de poco sorvia a traversa da n’atro corner de Hakimi, mente quest’urtimo o l’à preparòu unna occasione de testa pe Saibari che l’é stæta sciupâ.

O Camerun o l’é stæto sfurtunòu a no avei un rigô quande Mbeumo o l’é stæto toccòu inte l’äia, mentre l’arbitro mauritanian Dahane Beida o fasceiva segno de lasciâ zogâ; intanto Georges-Kevin Nkoudou o l’à incornouo fòua a-o palòu lontan inte quella ch’a l’é stæta a megio occasione da partia pe i Leoin Indomabili.

Quarche menutto dòppo o Marocco o l’à fæto o 2-0 pe serâ o conto, quande Saibari o l’é stæto lasciòu sensa marcatura a-o palòu lontan e o l’à avûo o tempo de controlâ a bala e tirâ basso into canto lontan da ræ.

Ismael Saibari o l’à dæto respiro a-o Marocco contro o Camerun (REUTERS)

Into atro quarto de finâ de venerdì, Iliman Ndiaye o l’à segnòu l’unico go mentre o Senegal o s’é assicûou un pòsto inta semifinâ de l’Afcon pe a tersa vòtta inti urtimi quàttero tornei, battendo o Mali, restòu in 10 òmmi, pe 1-0.

Ndiaye o l’à segnòu dòppo 27 menutti, sfruttando un grosso erro do portê pe portâ avanti o Senegal inte un derby teso contro i sò vexin de l’Africa occidentâ.

O Mali o l’é stæto ridûto in 10 òmmi pe o segondo tempo dòppo che o capitann-o Yves Bissouma o l’é stæto espulso pe a segonda ammoniçion pròpio in scî fin do primmo tempo.

O l’é stæto ammonîo a primma vòtta pe un intrâ goffo a-o 25mo menutto e dòppo o l’é stæto cacciòu pe un fallo inutîle subbito contro Idrissa Gana Gueye.

O Mali o l’éan za restæti in 10 òmmi da-o 26mo menutto da partia precedente contro a Tunisia e ancon i é ariescii a passâ ai rigôi, ma sta vòtta no gh’é stæta nisciunna rimonta contro unna squaddra senegaleize de grann-a qualitæ.

Òua o l’à segnòu in tutte e çinque partîe do Marocco e o migliora o seu record de ciù go fæti da un marocchin inta mæxima fase finâ d’unna Coppa d’e Naçioin, ma o l’à lasciòu o campo into finî con a cöscia ben fasciâ, cösa che porrià preoccupâ o tecnico Walid Regragui.

E occasion son stæte ræe pe tutte e doe e squaddre, ma Abde Ezzalzouli l’à missou de poco a traversa con un colpo de testa su n’atro corner de Hakimi, mentre quest’urtimo o gh’à confeçionòu pe Saibari n’occasion de testa che no l’é stæta sfruttâ.

O Camerun o l’é stæto sfurtunòu a no ottignî un rigô quande Mbeumo o l’é stæto fermòu in area e l’arbitro mauritanian Dahane Beida l’à fæto segno de lasciâ zêugâ, mentre Georges-Kevin Nkoudou l’à mandòu de testa feua da-o palòu lontan inta megio occasione da partia pe i Leoin Indomabili.

Pochi menutti dòppo o Marocco o l’à portòu o punteggio in sciô 2-0, ciuddendo de fæto a contesa, quande Saibari o l’é restòu sensa marcatura a-o palòu lontan e l’à avûo o tempo de controlâ a bala e tirâ rasotæra into canto lontan da ræ.

Ismael Saibari o gh’à dæto respiro a-o Marocco contro o Camerun (REUTERS)

Ndiaye l’à segnòu dòppo 27 menutti, sfruttando un gròssimo errore do portê pe portâ avanti o Senegal inte un derby teso contro i seu vexin de l’Africa occidentâ.

O Mali o l’é restòu in dësci òmmi pe tutto o segondo tempo dòppo che o capitann-o Yves Bissouma o l’é stæto espulso pe a segonda ammoniçion pròpio in sciô scadde do primmo tempo.

O l’é stæto ammonîo a primma vòtta pe un intervento maldestro a-o 25mo menutto e dòppo o l’é stæto cacciòu pe un fallo inutîle contr’a Idrissa Gana Gueye.

O Mali o l’éa za restòu in dësci òmmi da-o 26mo menutto da precedente sfida contro a Tunisia e l’é comunque ariescîo a passâ ai rigôi, ma stavòtta no gh’é stæta nisciunna rimonta possìbile contro unna squaddra senegaleize solida e ben registrâ.

Pretty much.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

O cavallerizzo vinçitô de Gruppo 1 o comensciâ a seu giorno inta segonda corsa do programma quande Ausbred Yahoo o corriâ o Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m), con l’apprendista Ella Drew, che reclama doî chili, in sella.

E corse tornan a Coffs Harbour domenega.

Ausbred Yahoo o l’é stæto in bon-a forma de corsa, con un terso posto a Kempsey trei partenze fa, seguîo da doî segondi posti consecutivi a Coffs Harbour, l’urtimo quande o l’é stæto battûo da-o rival de domenega Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith o se collega con un’atra apprendista, Leanne Boyd, che reclama trei chili, quande Never Island a partiâ inta Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Vinçitricce de trei de e seu 15 partenze, Never Island a portiâ 59,5 chili dòppo l’abbuono de Boyd. Never Island a l’é stæta battûa pe meno de unna lunghessa quande a l’é arrivâ segonda drento a Montgomery a Grafton, e a l’ha confermòu con un quinto posto a l’urtima a Coffs Harbour drento a In The Fine Print, quande a l’é stæta torna battûa pe meno de unna lunghessa.

Raymond Spokes o montiâ o Monte Cruise preparòu da Mayfield-Smith inta O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise a l’é anch’êua vinçitricce de trei corse in sôllo nêuve partenze. A no corri da luggio, quande a l’é finîa urtima de òtto a Eagle Farm, e a l’ha fæto doî prove in sto tracciou in preparazion do seu ritorno, finindo segonda drento a-a vinçitricce de Wyong de sabbo Petticoat primma de vinçe l’urtima de ste prove.

Mayfield-Smith o completa a giornâ quande o se ricollega con Boyd, quande leua a montiâ Cardsharp inta Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Ausbred Yahoo o sta attraversando un bon momento de forma: dòppo un terso posto a Kempsey trei uscite fa, o l’ha collezionòu doî segondi posti consecutivi a Coffs Harbour, l’urtimo quande o l’é stæto battûo da Caledonian, rivale de domenega.

Mayfield-Smith o se affida anche a n’atra apprendista, Leanne Boyd, che a pò reclamâ trei chili, quande Never Island a corrîa inta Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Vincitricce de trei de e seu 15 partenze, Never Island a portiâ 59,5 chili dòppo l’abbuono de Boyd. A Grafton a l’é stæta battûa de meno de unna lunghessa quande a l’é arrivâ segonda drento a Montgomery, e a l’ha confermòu quella prestazion con un quinto posto a l’urtima a Coffs Harbour drento a In The Fine Print, torna battûa de meno de unna lunghessa.

Raymond Spokes o montiâ Monte Cruise, preparâ da Mayfield-Smith, inta O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise a l’é anch’êua vincitricce de trei corse in sòlle nêuve partenze. A no corri da luggio, quande a l’é finîa urtima fra òtto a Eagle Farm, e in preparazion do seu ritorno a l’ha fæto doî trial in questo tracciato, arrivando segonda drento a Petticoat, vincitricce sabbo a Wyong, primma de vinçe l’urtimo di doî.

Mayfield-Smith o completa a giornâ quande o torna a unîse con Boyd, che a montiâ Cardsharp inta Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

{
  "landing_page.why_join_company.free.description": "We don't get in the way of you interacting with people and having fun. People can support us for nice to have features.",
  "landing_page.testimonials.description": "Thousands of members have found friendships, a community, love, and much more with us. Here are just a few of their stories:",
  "advertise.page_title": "Advertise on {{website_name}}",
  "advertise.why_advertise.title": "Why Advertise on with us?",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.description": "Here are just a few reasons:",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_2": "With ~100,000 new members joining us every month, you'll reach new customers daily.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_3": "You'll have access to a dashboard so you know how your ads are doing 24/7.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_4": "You can change up your ads throughout the month to keep things fresh.",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.description": "Rather than selling impressions or clicks, we’ve divided our ad space into equally sized slots:",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.item_3": "Ads run from the 1st to the last day of the month",
  "advertise.cost.content.description": "A slot starts at $500 USD per month. If you would like to run more than one slot a month, each additional slot starts at $400 USD per month.",
  "advertise.cost.content.note": "Renew by the 15th of the month to guarantee your slots for the next month.",
  "advertise.contact_us.content.description": "If you have any questions or would like to advertise on our website please email us at:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.title": "Ad Image Specs",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.aspect_ratio": "Aspect ratio:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.display_size": "Display size:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.title": "Ad Text Specs",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.specs.lines_label": "# of lines:",
  "advertise.aside.help_note": "Don't have an ad? We can help you with that. All you have to do is just get into {{link_tag_start}}contact with us{{link_tag_end}}.",
  "advertise.sample_ads.title": "Sample Ads",
  "advertise.sample_ads.cta_label": "view all",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.heading": "Welcome Home",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.subheading": "Setting yourself up for success.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.pace.heading": "Go at Your Own Pace",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.consent.description": "You will get the most out of the app by respecting people’s boundaries.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.love.description": "Love what you find appealing and interesting. The more you love, the better we can recommend stuff you'll enjoy.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.scene.heading": "Find Your Local Scene"
}
```

source_doc:
2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Unfortunately, this leaves me at square one. The makeup of the plant matter is similar to the surrounding area. Any of the various creates that pass through here could have easily urinated in just that area, but the amount of animal traffic would make it difficult to narrow suspects.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Inspector Clouseau did not roll around in the area from what I could tell, but he did stop in the spot for around a minute. It is too far away from any of my cameras to tell exactly what he was doing, but movement suggests sniffing around.
4/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Whatever X22 was doing, I don't believe he is the reason everyone is interested. I have only found 1 additional The Inspector visit to the spot the day before. The camera recording the area only keeps the most recent 100GB, so I only have a limited time frame to check. So far, I have found no other traffic during the day. While secret kitty traffic at night is a possibility, it is unlikely.
6/
#SpookyKittiesSciences
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
2026-03-23 Canta tra ti e ti a sigla de serie animâ dei X-Men: Purtroppo, questo me lassa daccapo. A compoçizion de-a materia vegetale a l'é simile a quella de l'area intorno. Quarchedunn-a de-e varie creature che passan de chì a porieiva beniscimo avei piscioou pròpio in quell'area lì, ma a quantità de traffico animale a rende dificile restrenze i sospetti.
3/
#ScienseDeiGattiniSpaventosi

2026-03-23 Canta tra ti e ti a sigla de serie animâ dei X-Men: L'ispettô Clouseau no s'é rotolou in quell'area da quello che posso di, ma s'é fermou in quel ponto pe circa un minuto. L'é tròppo lontan da tutte e mæ camêre pe capî esattamente cöse o fasse, ma o movimento o fa pensâ che o stesse annusando in giro.
4/
#ScienseDeiGattiniSpaventosi

2026-03-23 Canta tra ti e ti a sigla de serie animâ dei X-Men: Cöseunque X22 stesse faxendo, no credo che segge o motivo pe cui tutti son interessæ. Ho trovou solo 1 visita in ciù de l'Ispettô in quel ponto o giorno primma. A camera che registra quell'area a conserva solo i 100GB ciù recenti, quindedì ho solo un arco de tempo limitou da controlâ. Fin chi, no ho trovou nisciun atro passaggio de giorno. Benché o traffico segreto di gattini de neutte segge 'na possibilità, l'é poco probabile.
6/
#ScienseDeiGattiniSpaventosi

Son e 9:04 e semmo ancora a-o 100%.
A dila tutta, fin chi no gh'emmo fæto praticamente ninte col telefono.
L'é stæto quasi sempre lì inta mæ scarsella.
E poei sì, mi mette o latte pe primmo, perché cösì i cereali no diventan mösci.
Purtroppo, pà che a mæ opinione a no segge tanto popolâ.

@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.

source_doc:
Falkirk strengthen top six hopes with away win at St Mirren

Miller then made sure of the points just after the hour mark as he capitalised on some static St Mirren defending to race on to his own blocked shot before dinking the ball over George.

It was an afternoon to forget for St Mirren, who lost Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips and George to injury as they slipped to a third straight defeat.

Falkirk had the first opening in the 18th minute when Barney Stewart laid the ball off to Dylan Tait, whose curling effort from just outside the box took a slight deflection before cannoning off the top of the crossbar.

St Mirren finally threatened just after the half-hour mark when Mikael Mandron shot from a tight angle, forcing Falkirk goalkeeper Scott Bain into a smart stop with his feet.

Falkirk then raced down the other end and the lively Miller was released and allowed to shoot from a similar angle but George comfortably saved.

The match was finally coming to life and Dan Nlundulu was the next to fire at goal in the 36th minute after the Bairns had given up possession cheaply, but it was a routine stop at the near post by Bain.

Nlundulu then got in behind and slid the ball home, though the cheers from the home fans were short-lived as the assistant referee raised his flag for what appeared to be a clear offside.

The hosts had already lost Donnelly to injury midway through the first half and they suffered a further blow when Phillips, who appeared to hurt his shoulder in the opening period, came off at the interval.

The match was crying out for a moment of quality and it came 10 minutes into the second half through Yeats.

Tait's perfect through ball released Miller, and although George came racing out of his goal and timed his challenge well, the loose ball fell invitingly for Yeats, who curled a stunning first-time finish into the top corner of the unguarded St Mirren goal.

It got even better for the away side just after the hour mark as the Bairns doubled their lead.

Miller's initial shot from the edge of the box was blocked by Scott Tanser but, as the home defence hesitated, Miller reacted first to run on to the loose ball and lift a right-footed shot over the onrushing George.

St Mirren suffered yet another blow shortly after as the keeper was forced off to be replaced by Ryan Mullen.

The enforced changes and the quickfire goals seemed to rock the hosts and they never threatened a comeback, with their afternoon summed up in the 89th minute when Tanser completely mis-kicked his attempted volley from six yards out.
